title: Superfluid - REKT
relevance_summary: Exploit involving impersonation of accounts to drain funds using ConstantFlowAgreement and InstantDistributionAgreement

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls deleteAnyFlow() or similar functions with suspicious ctx values

red_flags: suspicious ctx values in function calls
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls deleteAnyFlow() with suspicious ctx values
summary: The Superfluid protocol was hacked due to a vulnerability in the ctx serialization process, allowing attackers to impersonate other accounts and drain funds. A guard could have detected and blocked suspicious ctx values in function calls.
